behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names Header.svelte path, click_nav variable, aria-label with 'menu', 'hidden lg:flex', 'fixed', 'inset-0', 'lg:hidden', {#each} with destructuring, and all hrefs asserted in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required patterns (Tailwind classes, structural changes) but does not provide the exact code diff; agent must compose the fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral patterns (aria-label with menu, fixed/inset-0/lg:hidden in overlay, {#each} iteration, >=3 close handlers) rather than exact gold variable names; multiple correct implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocesses (pnpm install, format:check, client/core build) and run Node scripts to parse the Svelte file, not just text assertions.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require specific overlay patterns, removal of show_nav reactive, aria-label, and >=3 close-on-navigate handlers—a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each instruction requirement (overlay, decoupling, close-on-navigate, a11y, data-driven nav) maps to a dedicated test function.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies a UI component; no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands match (Header.svelte, pnpm, @gradio/client) consistently.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names Header.svelte which is the component under discussion; it does not give exact line numbers, and localization is explicit by design.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-editing task, not an agentmd/config edit.
